verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: Crying, I poured my heart to You, Lord, You gave me assurance, You gave me a Sword; Now there's no question, there is no doubt, I know that I know what You're all about.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You're my absolute, You're my strong and mighty hold, You're the Rock through all the ages, You're the One I now behold; You're my absolute, I place my life into Your hands, And I know that You will lead me, Safely to the promised land.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Never before have I felt such love, Never before have I seen Your pow'r; A life-changing work You have done in my life, Transforming my very heart's desire;

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You are my Savior, Redeemer and Friend, I'll never turn back to this world again; Abundance of mercy, and grace you bestow, There's one thing I want this whole world to know.
